description: Battery thermal runaway during high-temperature summer operations
mitigation: Use qualified cells, thermal monitoring, and preflight health checks.

description: False positive hotspot detection drives unnecessary dispatch activity
mitigation: Blend thermal thresholds with confidence scoring and operator review.

description: LTE backhaul outage delays alert delivery
mitigation: Provide degraded-mode buffering and alternate return-to-home procedures.

description: GNSS degradation causes unstable navigation near terrain features
mitigation: Implement loiter fallback, geofence limits, and operator override paths.

description: Mission logs are incomplete after abrupt power loss
mitigation: Flush event batches frequently and archive logs on the ground station.
